canonical_definition: A comprehensive evaluation framework and dataset of 1,000 logic grid puzzles with controllable and quantifiable complexity, designed to systematically assess the logical reasoning capabilities and scaling limits of LLMs.
papers: ZebraLogic: On the Scaling Limits of LLMs for Logical Reasoning

definitions.text: A comprehensive evaluation framework and dataset of 1,000 logic grid puzzles with controllable and quantifiable complexity, designed to systematically assess the logical reasoning capabilities and scaling limits of LLMs.
definitions.paper: ZebraLogic: On the Scaling Limits of LLMs for Logical Reasoning

relationships.paper: English-based acoustic models perform well in the forced alignment of twoEnglish-based Pacific Creoles
relationships.evidence: we introduce ZebraLogic, a comprehensive evaluation framework for assessing LLM reasoning performance on logic grid puzzles derived from constraint satisfaction problems (CSPs). (Abstract)
